source_meaning: to be endless; to be limitless; to be uncountable
target_meaning: a number; a very large amount of something

source_meaning: a video tape even without watching (For something to be immediately obvious or clear, as if being played back from a video tape)
to have nothing to lose (said when beginning a new enterprise, etc.)
target_meaning: to try one's luck (taking risks, trying something in the hope of being successful)

source_meaning: "a marten that hunts tigers"; a David before a Goliath
target_meaning: paper tiger (a seemingly fierce or powerful person, country or organisation)

source_meaning: "flower in a greenhouse"; an excessively sheltered person who cannot cope with the real world [since before 1930s]
target_meaning: ivory tower (sheltered, overly-academic existence or perspective)

source_meaning: to turn out to be useful; to prove its worth
target_meaning: to come in handy (to be useful or heplful)
to live and let live (to be tolerant)

source_meaning: a psychological burden that is relieved
target_meaning: to feel an extremely deep sense of accomplishment
